description: A person with whom one shares a chosen, often purpose-driven, relationship based on mutual support and shared goals. It emphasizes a functional, collaborative bond.
rationale: The word 'himao' is phonetically rich. 'hi' uses a breathy 'h' and insightful 'i' to suggest a conscious, clear-eyed choice (Buddhist). 'ma' provides a sense of stable, reliable presence (Pre-industrial). The vowel hiatus 'a-o' sonically represents individuals ('a') coming together to form a unified, purpose-driven group ('o'), reflecting a Solarpunk principle of collaboration.
